entities.name: WINHTTP_SECURITY_INFO
entities.description: 结构包含请求的 SChannel 连接和密码信息。

entities.name: WinHttpAddRequestHeaders
entities.description: 将一个或多个 HTTP 请求标头添加到 HTTP 请求句柄。

entities.name: WinHttpCheckPlatform
entities.description: Determines whether the current platform is supported by this version of Microsoft Windows HTTP Services (WinHTTP).

entities.name: WinHttpCloseHandle
entities.description: Closes a single HINTERNET handle. This function should be called to clean up resources when a handle is no longer needed.

entities.name: WinHttpConnect
entities.description: Establishes a connection to an HTTP server and returns a HINTERNET connection handle for that session. This function specifies the initial target server for HTTP requests.

entities.name: WinHttpCrackUrl
entities.description: 将URL分隔为其组件部分，例如主机名和路径。

entities.name: WinHttpDetectAutoProxyConfigUrl
entities.description: Detects the URL of the Proxy Auto-Configuration (PAC) file. The returned URL should be freed using WinHttpFreeProxyResult.

entities.name: WinHttpFreeProxyResult
entities.description: 释放从先前调用 WinHttpGetProxyResult 中检索到的代理结果数据。

entities.name: WinHttpGetProxyResult
entities.description: Retrieves the proxy result from a previous call to WinHttpGetProxyForUrlEx.

entities.name: WinHttpGetProxySettingsEx
entities.description: Retrieves extended proxy settings for HTTP connections.

entities.name: WinHttpGetProxySettingsResultEx
entities.description: Contains the results from calling WinHttpGetProxySettingsEx function.

entities.name: WinHttpOpenRequest
entities.description: Creates an HTTP request handle.

entities.name: WinHttpQueryAuthSchemes
entities.description: Queries the authentication schemes supported by the server.

entities.name: WinHttpQueryConnectionGroup
entities.description: Retrieves an enumeration of HTTP connections and their GUIDs.

entities.name: WinHttpQueryHeaders
entities.description: Retrieves header information associated with an HTTP request. Provides a way to retrieve parsed header name and value strings.

entities.name: WinHttpQueryOption
entities.description: 函数查询指定句柄上的 Internet 选项。

entities.name: WinHttpReadData
entities.description: Reads data from a handle opened by the WinHttpOpenRequest function.

entities.name: WinHttpReceiveResponse
entities.description: 函数等待接收由WinHttpSendRequest发起的HTTP请求的响应。

entities.name: WinHttpSendRequest
entities.description: Sends the specified request to the HTTP server.

entities.name: WinHttpSetCredentials
entities.description: Sets the authorization credentials to be used for a specified HTTP request.

entities.name: WinHttpSetOption
entities.description: Sets an Internet option for the specified WinHTTP session, connection, or request.

entities.name: WinHttpSetStatusCallback
entities.description: Sets a callback function that WinHTTP can call as progress is made during an operation.

entities.name: WinHttpTimeToSystemTime
entities.description: 函数采用 HTTP 时间/日期字符串并将其转换为 SYSTEMTIME 结构。

entities.name: WinHttpWebSocketClose
entities.description: Closes a WebSocket connection handle opened by WinHttpWebSocketCompleteUpgrade.

entities.name: WinHttpWebSocketCompleteUpgrade
entities.description: Completes a WebSocket handshake started by WinHttpSendRequest. This function is part of the WinHTTP WebSocket API for handling WebSocket connections.

entities.name: WinHttpWriteData
entities.description: Writes request data to an HTTP server.

entities.name: WINHTTP_PROXY_CHANGE_CALLBACK
entities.description: Defines an application-defined callback function that is called when proxy settings change.

entities.name: WINHTTP_STATUS_CALLBACK
entities.description: 应用程序定义的状态回调函数，用于接收WinHTTP操作的状态通知。

entities.name: WINHTTP_ASYNC_RESULT
entities.description: 包含异步WinHTTP函数调用结果的结构体。与WINHTTP_STATUS_CALLBACK回调函数配合使用。

entities.name: WINHTTP_AUTOPROXY_OPTIONS
entities.description: 该结构用于向WinHttpGetProxyForURL函数指示是指定代理自动配置(PAC)文件的URL，还是通过DHCP或DNS查询自动查找对网络的URL。

entities.name: WINHTTP_CERTIFICATE_INFO
entities.description: 结构包含从服务器返回的证书信息。 WinHttpQueryOption 函数使用此结构。

entities.name: WINHTTP_CONNECTION_INFO
entities.description: Contains the source and destination IP addresses for the request that generated the response.

entities.name: WINHTTP_CREDS
entities.description: 包含用于服务器和代理身份验证的用户凭据信息

entities.name: WINHTTP_CURRENT_USER_IE_PROXY_CONFIG
entities.description: 结构包含 Internet Explorer 代理配置信息。

entities.name: WINHTTP_EXTENDED_HEADER
entities.description: 将 HTTP 请求标头表示为名称/值字符串对。

entities.name: WINHTTP_HEADER_NAME
entities.description: 表示 HTTP 请求标头名称。

entities.name: WINHTTP_HOST_CONNECTION_GROUP
entities.description: Represents a group of connections to a specific host in WinHTTP.

entities.name: WINHTTP_MATCH_CONNECTION_GUID
entities.description: Contains the GUID used for connection matching in WinHTTP.

entities.name: WINHTTP_PROXY_INFO
entities.description: Contains the proxy configuration information for a session or default proxy settings.

entities.name: WINHTTP_PROXY_RESULT
entities.description: 包含由WinHttpGetProxyResult函数返回的代理结果条目集合的结构体

entities.name: WINHTTP_PROXY_RESULT_ENTRY
entities.description: 包含调用 WinHttpGetProxyResult 函数返回的代理结果条目信息。

entities.name: WINHTTP_PROXY_SETTINGS_EX
entities.description: Represents extended proxy settings configuration.

entities.name: WINHTTP_PROXY_SETTINGS_PARAM
entities.description: 该结构体表示WinHTTP的扩展代理设置参数。

entities.name: WINHTTP_REQUEST_STATS
entities.description: Contains various statistics information about an HTTP request.

entities.name: WINHTTP_REQUEST_TIMES
entities.description: Contains various timing information for an HTTP request.

entities.name: WINHTTP_WEB_SOCKET_ASYNC_RESULT
entities.description: Contains the result status of a WebSocket operation.

entities.name: WINHTTP_WEB_SOCKET_STATUS
entities.description: 包含WebSocket操作状态的枚举。

entities.name: WINHTTP_PROXY_SETTINGS_TYPE
entities.description: 指定代理设置类型的枚举常量，用于扩展代理设置API。

entities.name: WINHTTP_REQUEST_STAT_ENTRY
entities.description: 枚举类型，列出了WinHTTP请求可用的统计信息类型。

entities.name: WINHTTP_REQUEST_TIME_ENTRY
entities.description: 结构体包含HTTP请求的时间信息条目。

entities.name: WINHTTP_WEB_SOCKET_BUFFER_TYPE
entities.description: Specifies the type of WebSocket buffer.

entities.name: WINHTTP_WEB_SOCKET_CLOSE_STATUS
entities.description: Specifies the status codes for WebSocket close operations.

entities.name: WINHTTP_WEB_SOCKET_OPERATION
entities.description: 枚举定义了WebSocket操作类型

entities.name: ConnectionInfo
entities.description: Contains SChannel connection information (SecPkgContext_ConnectionInfo) and cipher information (SecPkgContext_CipherInfo) for requested security information.
entities.remarks: 此结构与 WinHttpQueryOption 一起使用，通过指定 WINHTTP_OPTION_SECURITY_INFO 标志来检索请求的安全信息。
